title: MindFlow
description: An intelligent knowledge engine and educational app for SSC CGL, NTPC, and BPSC. It uses adaptive learning to make complex topics feel like play.

title: BharatItihas - Indian History
description: An interactive Indian history timeline PWA. It features an immersive native app experience built with rich visualizations and AI.

title: Personal Diary App
description: A feature-rich journaling app with a distraction-free UI. It includes rich-text editing, secure Supabase backend, and PDF/Zip export capabilities.

title: CGL Hustle
description: A comprehensive preparation platform for SSC CGL aspirants. It offers detailed quizzes on Maths, English, Reasoning, GK, and Computer knowledge.

title: QuizLM React App
description: The modern React frontend for the QuizLM project. It provides a dynamic interface for interactive quiz generation and taking.

title: EduGuide Platform
description: An educational guide and counseling platform built to assist students in their learning journey and exam preparation.

title: Developer Portfolio
description: My personal developer portfolio website. It showcases my projects, coding skills, and professional journey beautifully.

title: QuizLM Official Website
description: The main landing page and web platform for QuizLM. It showcases features and provides access to interactive quizzes.

title: Interactive Flipbook
description: A highly engaging digital flipbook experience designed to let users read through study materials and generated quizzes.

title: QuizLM School Module
description: An educational management and assignment module dedicated specifically to school-level learning and quiz interactions.

title: PDF Utility Tools
description: A collection of helpful scripts and tools for parsing, generating, and manipulating PDF documents directly in the browser.

title: Question Bank API
description: A dedicated repository for managing, storing, and serving the underlying question bank data for quizzes.

title: QuizLM Timeline
description: A visual timeline module for QuizLM to track historical educational events and user quiz history interactively.

title: Digital Footprint Tracker
description: An experimental tool to trace digital footprints, track user activity history, and analyze web data.

title: Global UI Assets
description: A centralized repository containing static assets like images, icons, illustrations, and fonts used across all my projects.
